Definition.text: Area of Effect is a skill keyword used to define geometry and extent for effects that can affect multiple entities in an area.

Purpose.text: Normalize area-scoped damage and non-damage application behavior and interaction with supports and modifiers.

Core Rules.text: Only mechanics explicitly using Area of Effect geometry apply area-target checks; geometry and radius values are computed before applying AoE modifiers.

Internal Rules.text: Area of Effect is tag-based and can co-exist with other tags, including Projectile and Hit.

Calculation Order.text: 1) resolve skill keywords and tags 2) compute area geometry and center 3) collect entities in geometry 4) apply modifier scaling where explicitly allowed.

Priority Rules.text: Specific skill text and explicit mechanics override generic Area of Effect assumptions.

Preconditions.text: AoE geometry path is enabled only when source skill/effect declares Area of Effect scope.

Postconditions.text: Only entities within the resolved geometry can receive AoE-targeted effects.

Limitations.text: Area of Effect does not guarantee hit-type behavior; attack, spell, or dot mechanics still apply after targeting.

Caps.text: No intrinsic Area of Effect keyword cap stored at this layer; size modifiers are bounded by skill and support constraints.

Formula.text: No single global formula; apply modifier stack to radius/scale values after base geometry is established.

prevents: assumptions of non-area behavior for AoE-tagged mechanics

Conflicts.text: Specific geometry modifiers (cone, ring, trail-like mechanics) override generic circular assumptions.

Exceptions.text: Some tagged mechanics apply reduced or transformed geometry despite Area of Effect text.

Hidden Rules.text: Area of Effect behavior is an interaction of geometry + tag constraints rather than one static rule.

Developer Notes.text: Store as tag + geometry model; never equate with area damage type or Nearby semantics.

Historical Changes.text: No explicit patch-scoped redefinition of the Area of Effect keyword found in this batch.

text.note: Area of Effect remains a tag and geometry scope model with keyword-based interactions.

text: Fireball explosion radius scaling is applied as an Area of Effect modifier.
A cone-area skill uses the same keyword but follows cone geometry.
Area of Effect is the same as Explosion.
Area of Effect guarantees every listed hit is area damage.

cannot_affect: pure single-hit modifiers without AoE scope

metadata.source_authority: Path of Exile official terminology source
